title: Krieg Unleashes His Poison Gas Weapon
description: On pages 13–16, the fight against Krieg reaches a moral breaking point as Gin, Sanji, Zeff, and Luffy clash over debt, survival, and strength.
scene: Krieg’s weapons and cruelty force everyone at the Baratie to reveal what they truly value: victory, loyalty, survival, or protecting someone else’s dream.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Huh!? Wasn't it supposed to be a poison gas bomb!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A little slow on the Uptake, don'cha think!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: A single poison gas bomb is enough to entirely wipe out a small town.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ha ha! Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As if I'd waste it to kill you two pieces of trash!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He got me good.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Why the hell's he agreeing with him?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is what a battle is! I've got more ways to kill you than I can count!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now I'll ask you again! Which one of us do you think is more fit to become pirate King!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It definitely can't be you!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Gin!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: You're ResPON- Bible for killing that cook!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: But I'll kill this brat,

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Myself!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: D-Don Krieg is really pissed off!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: understood, Don.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sorry, Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But you can't win against me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haha...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: took the words right out of my mouth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn brat... I'll demonstrate to you the might of the ruler of East Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You'll know soon enough that your strange power is meaningless before me.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Keep talking.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll send you flying either way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll come on over there right now so wash your face and sit tight.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Hahaha... so you're stupid enough to try and come over here again, are you?

summary: This part pushes the Baratie battle toward its climax by contrasting Krieg’s ruthless power with Luffy and Sanji’s stubborn ideals.
